CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: David P. Wasserman, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Malta & Co., Inc. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection by counsel present. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Linda Foster, CSR# 13286. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Continued To Aug-05-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Pending Action For A Minor
Off Calendar May-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: May 15, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Petition for Order Approving Compromise is a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Lan Yang Xu was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the three minors, Jimmy Wang, Bill Wang and Jack Wang, all of whom were present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner Lan Yan Xu was placed under oath and testified.
Lan Jang was placed under oath and served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for petitioner.
No appearance by petitioner Kong Jing Wang.
Marina R Franco, Esq. appeared for defendant Malta & Co., Inc.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $500.00 for each minor.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

A net balance of $500.00 for each minor shall be deposited into three separate blocked accounts with Citibank, located at the cornor of Columbus Avenue and Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without written Court Orders, or until the minors reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Accounts, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Grant Ingram, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: RRDM, LLC & Underground Ventures, LLC
Steven Ruth, Esq., specially appeared for Plaintiff King Wang, ind. & as guardian ad litem only. Also present was Plaintiff Lan Ying Xu

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants RRDM, LLC's And Underground Ventures LLC's Motion To Compel Completion Of Independent Medical Examination is denied. Late opposition has been considered. There is nothing that would support a finding that the requested RAST allergy test was a part of the original notice of IME. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
